'''Implanters''' were [[Yuuzhan Vong]] creatures that "implanted" [[Yorik-Kul|surge-coral]] into sentient beings to make them into slaves. Also known as "creepers", these creatures carried dozens of surge-coral seeds on their backs. The creeper would inflict pain on and disable their victims by using their feathery appendages to disrupt the victim's [[nervous system]]. The victim would then be implanted with the seeds. Relatives of implanters were used in the [[escalation]] ceremony.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' {{1stID|Implanter}}
